role_summary: the executive director – finance oversees finance operations at the highest executive level  and contributes to organizational strategy.
responsibilities: • lead finance function across the organizati on  • drive financial strategy and performance management   • oversee compliance, reporting, and governance   • support corporate restructuring, m&a, and growth plans   • work closely with board and top leadership
qualifications: • ca with extensive executive expe rience   • strong leadership and strategic thinking
